channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump targets ‘Anonymous’ author and former top cybersecurity official in escalation of retribution
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump intensified his efforts to punish his critics on Wednesday by signing a pair of memoranda directing the Justice Department to investigate two officials from his first administration and stripping them of any security clearances they may have.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Sunny and pleasant afternoon, with warmer temperatures to come
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4) - Happy Wednesday, Utah! High pressure is slowly building in from the west and taking over our weather pattern. The high pressure will not only bring dry weather to the forecast but also come with the return of even warmer temperatures.
item.dc:creator: Alana Brophy, ABC 4

item.title: Americans convicted in Congo of a botched coup attempt now face US charges
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Three Americans repatriated to the United States from Congo this week have been charged with participating in an elaborate coup attempt aimed at overthrowing the African nation’s government last year, the U.S. Justice Department said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Rumor of monkey trade for child leads to Missouri foster mom's arrest
item.description: Officials say new child abuse charges filed against a Winfield woman who has fostered children for a decade are "just the tip of the iceberg.
item.dc:creator: Megan Mueller, KREX 5

item.title: Three Americans transferred from Congo to US, one arrested in Utah, charged with coup to overthrow government
item.description: Three Americans sentenced to life in prison in Congo were transferred to the U.S., and another was arrested in Utah in connection with an armed coup to overthrow DRC government.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Plane undergoes security search 'away from main terminal' near DC after ominous sound reported during flight
item.description: Frontier Airlines plane deplaned near Washington, D.C. on Wednesday after a security incident was reported by the crew mid-flight.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 1,700 pounds of butter recalled over bacteria contamination
item.description: Nearly a ton of salted butter is being recalled because, according to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration, the product is "contaminated with elevated levels of coliform," a bacteria found in animals' digestive tracts and waste.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shark attack survivor presses her state for an alert system to keep people safe in the water
item.description: An Alabama teen who narrowly survived a fierce shark attack last year is asking her state's lawmakers to support the creation of a new alert system.
item.dc:creator: Kim Chandler, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The world's most famous YouTuber slams Trump's tariff war
item.description: Entrepreneur and YouTube star MrBeast slammed President Trump’s “brutal” tariffs in a post on the social platform X on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KTLA 5

item.title: Group calls for investigation into Ms. Rachel over posts about Gaza children
item.description: Rachel Griffin Accurso, who goes by Ms. Rachel to her more than 14 million subscribers on YouTube, makes videos for children.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: No new hires, unless you prove AI can’t do the job: Shopify CEO
item.description: "Teams must demonstrate why they cannot get what they want done using AI," Shopify CEO Tobi Lutke wrote in a memo to employees.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kooiman, Fox 5

item.title: Trump tariffs, including massive levies on China, go into effect
item.description: President Donald Trump's latest round of sweeping reciprocal tariffs went into effect early Wednesday, including a 104 percent import tax on China.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Kennedy’s moves on measles don't quell criticism
item.description: The outbreak represents the first time Kennedy has had to reconcile his past as a leading critic of vaccines and his leadership of the federal health establishment.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump signs executive orders to boost coal, a reliable but polluting energy source
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Tuesday signed a series of executive orders aimed at boosting the struggling coal industry, a reliable but polluting energy source that’s long been in decline.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Shake Shack brings Dubai Chocolate Pistachio Shake to select L.A. locations
item.description: For those who were unsuccessful in recreating the viral Dubai chocolate bar or can’t afford a trip to get an authentic bar, Shake Shack has you covered. The fast-casual chain launched its Dubai Chocolate Pistachio Shake on Monday at select locations in New York City, Los Angeles, and Miami.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Judge tells government to provide evidence, or case against Columbia student Mahmoud Khalil is over
item.description: JENA, La. (AP) — An immigration judge in Louisiana said she would terminate the case against Mahmoud Khalil if the government does not provide evidence this week justifying their attempted deportation of the Columbia University student activist.
item.dc:creator: SARA CLINE and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Surgery nightmare: Hospital admits mistake after failed cancer surgery attempt
item.description: An investigation is underway at MountainView Hospital in Las Vegas after a cancer patient woke up to startling news in the operating room.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Murphy, Fox 5

item.title: Waiver allows Trump administration to bypass environmental rules to build more border walls
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — A waiver issued Tuesday by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security allows the federal government to bypass environmental regulations and begin construction to add more barriers along the U.S-Mexico border in Southern California even as illegal crossings have plummeted.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: National Weather Service no longer translating products for non-English speakers
item.description: The National Weather Service is no longer providing language translations of its products, a change that experts say could put non-English speakers at risk of missing potentially life-saving warnings about extreme weather.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Ex-member of former Gambia dictator's military unit is on trial in the US for torture
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A man accused of torturing people suspected in a planned coup against Gambia’s longtime leader was a low-ranking private in the West African country’s military who risked torture and death himself if he disobeyed superiors, a lawyer for the defendant told jurors Tuesday in opening stat
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Small plane skids off runway at Oregon airport, ends up in bay
item.description: A small private plane attempting to land at an Oregon airport skidded off the runway and into a body of water, leaving 5 people injured.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Foran, Fox 5

item.title: House Democrats targeting 3 Florida Republicans in 2026 midterms
item.description: Last month, the National Republican Congressional Campaign Committee (NRCC) released its target list, which included 26 House Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Clem Burke, multifaceted drummer of iconic rock group Blondie, has died
item.description: Clem Burke, whose versatile drumming propelled the iconic rock group Blondie during its decades performing everything from new-wave punk to disco-infused tunes, has died. He was 70. The band said in a statement on its website Monday that he died from cancer but no additional details were provided.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: RFK Jr. says he plans to tell CDC to stop recommending fluoride in drinking water
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on Monday said he plans to tell the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention to stop recommending fluoridation in communities nationwide.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM and MIKE STOBBE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump threatens additional 50 percent tariff on China
item.description: The White House had already imposed a 20 percent tariff on Chinese imports over fentanyl concerns, meaning China could face an effective tariff rate as high as 70 percent.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: Idaho mom who killed 2 of her kids goes on trial over death of her husband
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Lori Vallow Daybell, who was convicted of killing her two youngest children and conspiring to murder a romantic rival, is on trial again Monday. This time, she's accused in Arizona of conspiring to murder her estranged husband.
item.dc:creator: SEJAL GOVINDARAO and JACQUES BILLEAUD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Scientists genetically engineer wolves with white hair and muscular jaws like the extinct dire wolf
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are trotting, sleeping and howling in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S., according to the company that aims to bring back lost species.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Epic Universe opens a portal to the future of theme parks
item.description: As Universal Orlando Resort gears up for the highly anticipated May 22 opening of Epic Universe, it’s clear the resort is entering a new era - one that could redefine what a theme park can offer families.
item.dc:creator: Scott Gustin, WGN 9

item.title: Jay North, TV's mischievous Dennis the Menace, dies at 73
item.description: LAKE BUTLER, Fla. (AP) — Jay North, who starred as the towheaded mischief maker on TV's “Dennis the Menace” for four seasons starting in 1959, has died. He was 73.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina's highest court refuses to stop second firing squad execution
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina's highest court on Monday rejected the last major appeal from Mikal Mahdi, who is scheduled to die by firing squad later this week for the ambush killing of an off-duty police officer.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Seven GOP senators sign onto bill to check Trump's trade authority
item.description: Seven Republican senators have signed onto a bipartisan bill that would require Congress to approve President Trump’s steep tariffs on trading partners.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Buying Bitcoin? Here's what to know, according to the Utah Dept. of Commerce
item.description: If you're considering investing in cryptocurrency, the Utah Dept. of Commerce has some advice to help you avoid becoming victim of a scam.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Miami’s ‘Little Venezuela’ fears Trump's moves against migration
item.description: DORAL, Fla. (AP) — Wilmer Escaray left Venezuela in 2007 and enrolled at Miami Dade College, opening his first restaurant six years later.
item.dc:creator: GISELA SALOMON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US stocks dip after careening through a manic day following Trump's latest tariff threat
item.description: U.S. stocks swung wildly in a manic Monday after President Donald Trump doubled down on his tariffs, despite seeing how much Wall Street wants him to do the opposite.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump tariffs pose danger for vulnerable Republicans
item.description: Vulnerable House Republicans are being put on defense amid the fallout from President Donald Trump’s sweeping global tariffs, which have stoked economic uncertainty.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, Fox 5

item.title: Trump says he's not backing down, calls tariffs 'medicine' as markets reel
item.description: Speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One, Trump said he didn't want global markets to fall, but also that he wasn't concerned about the massive sell-off either.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
